sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (start_time TIMESTAMP, end_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO timestamps (start_time, end_time) VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01', TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10');
SELECT age(end_time, start_time) AS duration FROM timestamps;
UPDATE timestamps SET end_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-01-15' WHERE start_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01';
